# Edge Conductor

> Embedded AI and robotics engineering company based in Indore, India. Serving global clients remotely.

Edge Conductor builds AI-powered systems that run on actual hardware — not just in the cloud. Founded by engineers with 13+ years of embedded systems experience.

## Services

- Edge AI Systems: Computer vision and AI models running offline on Raspberry Pi, Jetson Nano. YOLOv8, OpenCV, TensorFlow Lite.
- Autonomous Robotics: ROS2-based robots with SLAM, LiDAR navigation, autonomous path planning.
- Industrial IoT: ESP32 devices with WiFi/Ethernet/4G GSM failover, MQTT dashboards, Modbus, RS485.
- Embedded Firmware & PCB Design: Custom firmware for STM32, ESP32, AVR. PCB design with KiCad.

## Notable Projects

- Hospital patient monitoring robot with fall detection (YOLOv8 + ROS2 + Raspberry Pi, 100% offline)
- Multi-network IoT device with automatic failover (WiFi → Ethernet → 4G GSM)
- Truck weighbridge with RFID vehicle detection and RS485 communication
- Smart water dispenser with QR payment (Razorpay + MQTT)
- LoRa GPS tracking system for no-network environments (1km range)

## Contact

- Email: edgeconductor@gmail.com
- Website: https://edgeconductor.com
- Phone: +91-9522596713
- Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

## API

This business exposes an agentic API for AI agents:
- GET  /api/info      — full company profile
- GET  /api/services  — services with skills and use cases
- GET  /api/projects  — portfolio with tags
- POST /api/inquire   — submit a project inquiry (sends email to owner)

## How to hire

Send project description, target hardware, timeline, and budget to edgeconductor@gmail.com. Response within 24 hours.
